title: Layed Out for You
description: Chickens now lay random items from a range of 1031-1085 unique possibilities (mod compatible items).
body:
# Layed Out for You

Let's be honest, eggs aren't the most beneficial item in Minecraft. But, that's okay...I know how to change that. "How," you ask? 

By using this, of course, you silly egg-head. This datapack allows for chickens of all three varients to lay items randomly out of a pool of 1031 unique item choices. Or, if you are using a few compatible mods, 1085 items.

### Compatible Mods:
- Farmer's Delight

- Pam's HarvestCraft 2: Food Core 
[Credit to Pamela Collins (MatrexsVigil, PamHarvestCraft) and Rhodox of the Painterly Pack)]

- Cultural Delights

- Sushi Go Crafting

- My Nether's Delight

- Emerald Items

### Several Minecraft versions
It works for Minecraft versions 1.21.5 - 1.21.100 (and likely further). Be aware that in most versions, a warning may appear that it is for the wrong version, but as long as you are using it in 1.21.5 or later - it should work, so no worries.

## Created by NightML, aka NightMareLore. 

Taking suggestions for datapacks via email: nightmarelore.10@gmail.com

Please enjoy! But, don't feel inclined to download it, if it isn't your style.
Though there is no active content, music videos will be eventually uploaded to **@NightMareLore10** on YouTube. [Please subscribe for more updates - completely free!]

## Will Likely Update Fairly Often (as of November 3, 2025 - Happy Halloween!)

P.S. I try my very best to ensure that all of my content is family friendly and respectful to all culture, race, religion, and other personal factors. If anyone at any point finds something to be disrespectful or non-family friendly, then you can contact me at nightmarelore.10@gmail.com. If I personally find that my content is disrespectful in any manner, then I will **_IMMEDIATELY_** change it to ensure that my community is a safe, kind, healthy, and supportive one!
